assertions.text: Detects and reads the existing PROGRESS.md file
Correctly identifies Phase 4 (Strategy) as the next incomplete phase
Generates strategy documents (lean-canvas.md, value-proposition.md, business-model.md, positioning.md, go-to-market.md)
Strategy content is coherent with the existing parking finder brief (IoT sensors, SF/LA market, freemium model)
Updates PROGRESS.md to mark Phase 4 as completed
